Class EurekaRegistration.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.netflix.eureka.serviceregistry.EurekaRegistration.Builder
Enclosing class:
EurekaRegistration
public static class EurekaRegistration.Builder extends Object
A builder for EurekaRegistration objects.
Author:
Spencer Gibb, Tim Ysewyn
